city_report.transport: There are no dedicated airport shuttles, however the airport is served as part of the municipal bus network. Use bus No 61 (or N61 at night) for a direct connection to the Central Train Station (Hlavná stanica). Or change for a tram at Trnavské mýto to get to the city (in order to get to the tram stop, use the underpass and the exit marked "Centrum" (city ) and take any tram in the direction towards .

attraction.name: Bratislava Castle
attraction.description: Main castle of the city overlooking the Danube.

attraction.name: St. Martin's Cathedral
attraction.description: Gothic cathedral and former coronation site of kings.

attraction.name: Michael's Gate
attraction.description: The only city gate preserved from the medieval fortifications.

attraction.name: Grassalkovich Palace
attraction.description: The residence of the President of Slovakia.

attraction.name: Slavin Memorial
attraction.description: Monument and cemetery for Soviet soldiers.

attraction.name: UFO Observation Deck
attraction.description: Unique bridge structure with a deck offering city views.

attraction.name: Blue Church
attraction.description: Art Nouveau church famous for its blue color.

attraction.name: Primate's Palace
attraction.description: Neoclassical palace where the Peace of Pressburg was signed.

attraction.name: Old Town Hall
attraction.description: Complex of buildings dating back to the 14th century.

attraction.name: Eurovea
attraction.description: Modern riverside district for shopping and leisure.

city_report.description: Situata strategicamente sul Danubio, Bratislava combina costi di gestione competitivi con una crescita rapida nel settore dei servizi. La sua dimensione umana permette standard di sicurezza elevati e una rapida transizione verso infrastrutture green.
city_report.wiki_intro:
'''Bratislava''' (Hungarian phrasebook|Hungarian: ''Pozsony'', German phrasebook|German: ''Pressburg'', known as ''Prešporok'' before 1919), is the capital and largest city of Slovakia. It has a population of more than 475,000 (2021), and is the administrative, cultural and economic centre of the country. For most visitors, it is the entry point into the rest of the country.
Located on the borde...
